title: glandularia drummondii
intro: Glandularia drummondii, also known as Drummond's skullcap, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Glandularia drummondii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
